items.name: RSI7<19 + Donchian25/5
items.verdict: fallo: DSR 0.00; MC p=0.85; no bate B&H
items.code:
# --- COMBINACION: AND (ambas a la vez) ---
posA = RSI(7)<19 con close>MA200
posB = breakout Donchian 25/5
pos = posA * posB

# --- backtest comun (engine._returns) ---
pos = pos.shift(1).fillna(0.0); ret = close.pct_change()
cost = pos.diff().abs()*0.0003; daily = mean_over_assets(pos*ret - cost)

items.name: RSI6<20
items.verdict: fallo: DSR 0.00; MC p=0.54; no bate B&H
items.code:
# --- senal (engine._signal, rama 'rsi_meanrev') ---
rsi = RSI(close, 6)            # EWM Wilder, alpha=1/n
reg = close > close.rolling(100).mean()
pos = pd.Series(np.nan, index=close.index)
pos[(rsi < 20) & reg] = 1.0
pos[rsi > 84] = 0.0
pos = pos.ffill().fillna(0.0)

# --- backtest por activo (engine._returns), para cada uno de los 8 (7 FX + oro) ---
pos  = pos.shift(1).fillna(0.0)              # lag-1: decide hoy, aplica maniana
ret  = close.pct_change()
cost = pos.diff().abs().fillna(0.0) * 0.0003 # 3 bps por turnover (spread real)
r_activo = pos * 1.0 * ret - cost          # leverage = 1.0
daily = mean_over_assets(r_activo)           # cartera equal-weight

# --- evaluacion (engine.evaluate) ---
# IS 2014-2020 | OOS1 2007-2013 (crisis 2008) | OOS2 2021-2024
# Deflated Sharpe (contador global) | Monte Carlo (shift circular de la senal) | bate Buy&Hold

pos = pd.Series(np.nan, index=close.index)
pos[(rsi < 20) & reg] = 1.0
pos[rsi > 79] = 0.0
pos = pos.ffill().fillna(0.0)

# --- backtest por activo (engine._returns), para cada uno de los 8 (7 FX + oro) ---
pos  = pos.shift(1).fillna(0.0)              # lag-1: decide hoy, aplica maniana
ret  = close.pct_change()
cost = pos.diff().abs().fillna(0.0) * 0.0003 # 3 bps por turnover (spread real)
r_activo = pos * 1.0 * ret - cost          # leverage = 1.0
daily = mean_over_assets(r_activo)           # cartera equal-weight

# --- evaluacion (engine.evaluate) ---
# IS 2014-2020 | OOS1 2007-2013 (crisis 2008) | OOS2 2021-2024
# Deflated Sharpe (contador global) | Monte Carlo (shift circular de la senal) | bate Buy&Hold

rsi = RSI(close, 7)            # EWM Wilder, alpha=1/n
reg = close > close.rolling(100).mean()
pos = pd.Series(np.nan, index=close.index)
pos[(rsi < 21) & reg] = 1.0
pos[rsi > 75] = 0.0
pos = pos.ffill().fillna(0.0)

# --- backtest por activo (engine._returns), para cada uno de los 8 (7 FX + oro) ---
pos  = pos.shift(1).fillna(0.0)              # lag-1: decide hoy, aplica maniana
ret  = close.pct_change()
cost = pos.diff().abs().fillna(0.0) * 0.0003 # 3 bps por turnover (spread real)
r_activo = pos * 1.0 * ret - cost          # leverage = 1.0
daily = mean_over_assets(r_activo)           # cartera equal-weight

# --- evaluacion (engine.evaluate) ---
# IS 2014-2020 | OOS1 2007-2013 (crisis 2008) | OOS2 2021-2024
# Deflated Sharpe (contador global) | Monte Carlo (shift circular de la senal) | bate Buy&Hold

rsi = RSI(close, 4)            # EWM Wilder, alpha=1/n
reg = close > close.rolling(200).mean()
pos = pd.Series(np.nan, index=close.index)
pos[(rsi < 12) & reg] = 1.0
pos[rsi > 69] = 0.0
pos = pos.ffill().fillna(0.0)

# --- backtest por activo (engine._returns), para cada uno de los 8 (7 FX + oro) ---
pos  = pos.shift(1).fillna(0.0)              # lag-1: decide hoy, aplica maniana
ret  = close.pct_change()
cost = pos.diff().abs().fillna(0.0) * 0.0003 # 3 bps por turnover (spread real)
r_activo = pos * 1.0 * ret - cost          # leverage = 1.0
daily = mean_over_assets(r_activo)           # cartera equal-weight

# --- evaluacion (engine.evaluate) ---
# IS 2014-2020 | OOS1 2007-2013 (crisis 2008) | OOS2 2021-2024
# Deflated Sharpe (contador global) | Monte Carlo (shift circular de la senal) | bate Buy&Hold

rsi = RSI(close, 5)            # EWM Wilder, alpha=1/n
reg = close > close.rolling(100).mean()
pos = pd.Series(np.nan, index=close.index)
pos[(rsi < 14) & reg] = 1.0
pos[rsi > 83] = 0.0
pos = pos.ffill().fillna(0.0)

# --- backtest por activo (engine._returns), para cada uno de los 8 (7 FX + oro) ---
pos  = pos.shift(1).fillna(0.0)              # lag-1: decide hoy, aplica maniana
ret  = close.pct_change()
cost = pos.diff().abs().fillna(0.0) * 0.0003 # 3 bps por turnover (spread real)
r_activo = pos * 1.0 * ret - cost          # leverage = 1.0
daily = mean_over_assets(r_activo)           # cartera equal-weight

# --- evaluacion (engine.evaluate) ---
# IS 2014-2020 | OOS1 2007-2013 (crisis 2008) | OOS2 2021-2024
# Deflated Sharpe (contador global) | Monte Carlo (shift circular de la senal) | bate Buy&Hold

# --- senal (engine._signal, rama 'rsi_meanrev') ---
rsi = RSI(close, 5)            # EWM Wilder, alpha=1/n
reg = close > close.rolling(100).mean()
pos = pd.Series(np.nan, index=close.index)
pos[(rsi < 22) & reg] = 1.0
pos[rsi > 85] = 0.0
pos = pos.ffill().fillna(0.0)

# --- backtest por activo (engine._returns), para cada uno de los 8 (7 FX + oro) ---
pos  = pos.shift(1).fillna(0.0)              # lag-1: decide hoy, aplica maniana
ret  = close.pct_change()
cost = pos.diff().abs().fillna(0.0) * 0.0003 # 3 bps por turnover (spread real)
r_activo = pos * 1.0 * ret - cost          # leverage = 1.0
daily = mean_over_assets(r_activo)           # cartera equal-weight
